title: My Nether's Botany
description: A compatibility mod between My Nether's Delight and Botany Pots.
body:
My Nether's Botany adds compatibility between the mods Botany Pots and My Nether's Delight Refabricated. It's designed for fabric, so I cannot guarantee full functionality on Forge or other modloaders.

You can use Resurgent Soil as a soil block in botany pots, as well as tilling the soil to create Resurgent Farmland. Along with this, you can plant Crimson and Warped Fungus Colonies in a Botany Pot to farm _\*only\*_ the mushrooms as opposed to farming the wood.

![Three plants in botany pots, being the Powdery Cannon, Crimson Fungus Colony, and Warped Fungus Colony. ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a82e276cc98ae530d0c21e1c3c49246dceae1276.png)
